Package pjv.controller

Class ChatroomWindowController

java.lang.Object
pjv.controller.ChatroomWindowController
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.fxml.Initializable
public class ChatroomWindowController
extends java.lang.Object
implements javafx.fxml.Initializable
This is the controller class for the second scene of this application.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Michal Pechník and Oľga Ostashchuk

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors 
    Constructor Description
    ChatroomWindowController()  

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    void addMessage​(Message message)
    This method adds message to chat.
    Client getClient()
    This method gets Client instance.
    void initialize​(java.net.URL url, java.util.ResourceBundle resourceBundle)
    This method overrides initialize() method of Initializable interface in order to initialize textArea of all messages and start waiting for new messages.
    void refresh()
    This method refreshes textArea of all messages.
    static void setClient​(Client clientInput)
    This method sets Client instance.
    void waitForMessages()
    This method creates new Thread for waiting for new messages.

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • ChatroomWindowController

      public ChatroomWindowController()

  • Method Details

    • refresh

      public void refresh()
      This method refreshes textArea of all messages.

    • addMessage

      public void addMessage​(Message message)
      This method adds message to chat.
      Parameters:
      message - Message to be added to textArea of all sent messages

    • getClient

      public Client getClient()
      This method gets Client instance.
      Returns:
      Client instance

    • setClient

      public static void setClient​(Client clientInput)
      This method sets Client instance.
      Parameters:
      clientInput - Client

    • initialize

      public void initialize​(java.net.URL url, java.util.ResourceBundle resourceBundle)
      This method overrides initialize() method of Initializable interface in order to initialize textArea of all messages and start waiting for new messages.
      Specified by:
      initialize in interface javafx.fxml.Initializable
      Parameters:
      url - URL - The location used to resolve relative paths for the root object.
      resourceBundle - ResourceBundle - The resources used to localize the root object.

    • waitForMessages

      public void waitForMessages()
      This method creates new Thread for waiting for new messages.
